title: Assistant Mechanical Engineer
description:
Assistant Mechanical Engineer

Our client is a MNC chemical manufacturer company. They are currently seeking for Assistant Mechanical Engineer.

The role of the Assistant Mechanical Engineer includes:

  • To lead all preventive maintenance activities related to mechanical, track effectiveness of PM regime and propose reliability actions that is aligned with the company's ISO, GMP, FSSC, HACCP and QHSE requirements to drive further plant maintenance improvement.
  • To efficiently manage emergency / unscheduled repairs of production equipment and must possess the capacity to effectively liaise with resources (Internal and External) and guide team member in bridging job related technical deficiencies to prevent manufacturing downtime.
  • To lead improvement projects and manage internal/external resources to achieve set targets and spearhead project execution.
  • To monitor and perform data analysis of executed and completed equipment reliability action task in optimizing maintenance processes.
  • To assist in the planning, coordination with external vendors and preparation of all planned maintenance activities during plant shutdown to have smooth execution.
  • To closely monitor the Annual Preventive Maintenance (PM) Schedule execution and ensure allocation of required internal and external resources.
  • To lead and manage the mechanical team in providing emergency / unscheduled repairs of production equipment and perform remodeling and initiate improvements to equipment for better capability, performance ensuring compliance to the site’s procedure for change management.
  • Any other duties and responsibilities as assigned by the Maintenance Manager.


Job Requirement:

  • NITEC or Diploma in Mechanical Engineering
  • At least 5 years relevant maintenance experience in a process plant or manufacturing environment
  • Working knowledge of Microsoft Office applications
  • Hands-on experience in maintaining and troubleshooting machinery and equipment
  • Exposure to a Computerised Maintenance Management System (CMMS), such as SAP, would be an added advantage
  • Willingness to support emergency maintenance work when required

Interested candidates, please send your detailed resume stating Past Employments, including Reasons of Leaving, Last Drawn Salary for the most recent 2 positions (breakdown of basic salary, allowance, bonuses etc), Expected Basic Salary and availability.

WE REGRET TO INFORM THAT ONLY SHORTLISTED CANDIDATES WILL BE NOTIFIED

Manfield Employment Services Pte Ltd (Lic. No: 95C2823)
Posting Personnel: Win Hui
EA Personnel Reg No.: R23115634

By sending your job resume to us, it shall be deemed that you have agreed and hereby give your consent to MANFIELD in collecting, using and/ or disclosing your personal data for the purpose of accessing and processing your job application and/ or for future job opportunities within MANFIELD and/ or with the client(s) of MANFIELD. If you wish to withdraw your consent, please notify us. Kindly visit our company website for more information on the Privacy Policy.

postedCompany.description:
Manfield is a professional Headhunting, Recruitment and Consultancy Company first established in Singapore since 1995, we have also expanded our presence to Mainland China since 2005.

Our consultants in Manfield possess in-depth knowledge and expertise of industries that they specialise in.

With more than 100,000 unique profiles in our database, our dedicated team is constantly to source, interview and shortlist the ideal people for organisations, and have the passion to deliver effective human capital solutions. We are passionate to serve to our best capacity. We uphold professional values and instill confidence in our clients, including establishing long term business relationships with them.
